scripts.dev: concurrently -n home,projects,images -c blue,green,magenta "bun run --cwd web/home dev" "bun run --cwd web/projects dev" "serve web/images -p 6003"
scripts.preview: concurrently -n home,projects,images -c blue,green,magenta "serve dist/home -p 7001" "serve dist/projects -p 7002" "serve dist/images -p 7003"
